briefdescription.para: the shift amount used when concatenating two registers to form a 64-bit value.

detaileddescription.para: the shift amount is 32, indicating a 16-bit register width.

briefdescription.para: the type used to represent the value of a timer counter.

detaileddescription.para: Depending on the architecture being targeted, it is a 16-bit unsigned integer (u16).

parameterdescription.para: is the Scutimer Instance baseaddress to be worked on

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if initialization was successful XST_FAILURE in case of failure
